resources.string: Standalone implementation of three-finger swipe screenshots using the modern LSPosed API
Minimum vertical travel required to register a valid swipe. Lower values trigger more easily but increase false positives.
Ignore touches starting within this distance from any screen edge. Prevents conflicts with system back gestures and navigation bars.
Maximum time threshold between the first and third finger touching the display. Increase this if your fingers don\'t land perfectly in sync to ensure the gesture registers.
Minimum time between consecutive screenshots. Prevents accidental rapid-fire captures from a single long swipe.
Reflection (recommended)\nCalls the system screenshot API directly via DisplayPolicy or ScreenshotHelper. Works on stock and Pixel ROMs.
SYSRQ key injection\nSimulates a Print Screen key press. Use only if Reflection does nothing on your ROM. Apps can intercept this key.
Restores all gesture parameters, timings, and capture modes to their original factory values
Invokes the native system screenshot API directly. Leave this selected for stock Android and Pixel-based ROMs.
Injects a Print Screen key event. Use this only if Reflection does not work on your ROM. Some full-screen apps and games may consume the event before the system handles it.
Reboot your device to apply changes
